examples: Every minute during the hijack seemed like a week.
The front page is devoted to the continuing saga of the hijack.
Two men tried to hijack a plane on a flight from Riga to Murmansk.
Now, it appears more likely that migraines "hijack" the brain's normal pain circuitry, says Dr. Dodick.
The most loyal fans can hijack a brand and make serious trouble for a company.
